# PropVista — AI-Powered Real Estate Platform

> PropVista helps users find residential and commercial properties across India using GPT-4 powered search, live market scraping from 99acres, MagicBricks, and Housing.com, and location trend analysis.

## What PropVista Is

PropVista is an AI-powered real estate platform serving homebuyers, sellers, and renters across India. Users search for flats, villas, apartments, and houses using natural language; the platform scrapes live listings from major Indian property portals and ranks results using GPT-4.1.

## Core Features

- **AI Property Search**: Natural language search powered by GPT-4.1. Firecrawl scrapes live listings from 99acres, MagicBricks, and Housing.com in real time.
- **Location Trend Analysis**: AI-generated market insights for Indian cities — price trends, demand signals, investment outlook.
- **Property Listing Management**: Verified sellers can list and manage properties directly on the platform.
- **Appointment Booking**: Users can schedule property viewings through the platform.
- **Admin Dashboard**: Full property lifecycle management with analytics.

## Cities Covered

Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bangalore, Ahmedabad, Pune, Hyderabad, Chennai

## Property Types

Apartments (1BHK, 2BHK, 3BHK, 4BHK+), Villas, Independent Houses, Commercial Spaces, Plots

## Technology

- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite (hosted on Vercel)
- Backend: Node.js + Express + MongoDB (hosted on Render)
- AI: GPT-4.1 via GitHub Models API (user-supplied key)
- Scraping: Firecrawl (user-supplied key, real-time scraping)
- Auth: JWT + httpOnly refresh tokens, email verification
